strategy: Hit with Fire. He is Ice, resists Ice 80%, and takes boosted Fire damage.
He removes every normal Trap placed on him, but Feint is the exception. Set up with Feint, not regular traps.
Whenever he is attacked he Ice-Traps all Wizards, then casts Blizzard and Storm Lord. Expect return damage; shield Ice or heal before your big hit.
He is stunable; a stun can deny his Blizzard turn.
Feint, blade, then finish with one Fire AoE to clear him and both Wildclaws.
cheatNotes: He removes every ordinary Trap placed on him, so plain traps are wasted.
Feint is the exception and sticks. Use Feint for your trap damage.
Attacking him makes him Ice-Trap all Wizards and cast Blizzard and Storm Lord back. Be ready to shield Ice or heal.
